arts.ttl: Inter closely following Udinese’s Lorenzo Lucca
arts.sum: Serie A champions Inter have been linked with a move for Bologna’s Santiago Castro in the last few weeks and they are now also keeping tabs on Udinese’s Lorenzo Lucca.…

arts.ttl: Between History & Salvation: Inter & Milan Collide in Coppa Italia Semi-Finals
arts.sum: Inter and Milan will trade tackles in a mouth-watering Coppa Italia semi-final tie at the start of next month. For Inter, reaching the final has become an all-too-familiar feeling. The post Between History & Salvation: Inter & Milan Collide in Coppa Italia Semi-Finals appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
